---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for RTRT
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve? Which token-reduction surface does it improve (compress / proxy / memory / providers / templates / mcp / dashboard)?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like this to work. CLI shape, MCP tool name, or dashboard endpoint if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references here.
